subcodes.first_line: My dear Friend: Pleasing and acceptable as is a person of righteous actions before God’s Holy Threshold, yet deeds should proceed from knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز هر چند شخص نیکوکار در درگاه پروردگار مقبول است ولی اول دانستن است
subcodes.subjects: @existence; immortality of the human soul, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @Christ; Christianity, @reincarnation, @goodly deeds; actions
